raw_text: Blinkit never disappoints! The delivery is always on time, and I really love the fun games and creative designs on their delivery packages. Such a small touch makes the whole experience enjoyable. Keep it up!" ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

I have downloaded this app only recently .i really find this app good They supply fresh products, which is really appreciable at reasonable prices. i would like to add returns are with out hassles and refund is quick.

Very disappointing experience with Blinkit. This was my first order and I never even received the parcel. The delivery person was behaving very rudely and giving unnecessary excuses instead of helping. On top of that, customer care service was also poor and not responding properly. I expected much better service from such a platform.
Product descriptions are always incomplete and when you order something trusting the platform, the return is rejected because the product was opened. Don't buy high value items.
I pay in full, I dont cancel any order yet the cash on delivery option is showing unavailable for me. It has been happening for over a week. That's it, I am switching to competitor

good quality products and fast delivery yep, but they literally go ahead list defective products or products with missing parts again on sale after the product has been returned due to issues. I got problematic products so I returned it but today blinkit literally listed it on sale again and cause of urgent need I bought it thinking it was restocked, but it was the same product I returned.

Excellent Hospitality & Service. Never seen in any other Indian Companies. 2 star because The Store manager and neither the delivery person check whether the parcel , packet or Package is properly packed or not. they are supposed to check if the item is genuine or not with a proper seal or box... and they don't do it. And because of that I faced a lot of embarrassment..!!! And above all the biggest issue is your not getting connected at all with the customer service... very bad😡

I usually never give any rating but this app is literally my go to app and I absolutely love it services even if I get a defective item they provide a full refund in just 2 to 3 minutes you can absolutely go for this app anytime !!! ❤️

I am confident that customer confidential data is leaking from the blinkit app. whenever I am adding any card and buy something, after 2-3 days someone is trying to use my card for international transactions. It is very serious issue and requesting blinkit to take immediate action

Scammers, charge high delivery and handling charges and when they make a mistake they dont refund this, and to fix if i order again they charge the same fees again plus surcharge... This has happened multiple times now, i will stick to flipkart minutes or amazon now

i have ordered a boat earbuds of 1099, the product described ENC, but it doesn't have that feature so i contacted the blinkit chat and asked either for replacement or return.. I spoke to diya from chat team and escalation team Anuj both denied stating that they don't have option either for return r replacement.. don't buy any electronic item guys they will redirect u to brand.. they mention all guff ups in app..

what the hell you guys are doing with my blinkit account... I'm not able to place an order due to not worthy tecnical issue.. its been 3 days im still not able to order. also after adding money in blinkit wallet the issue remains the same. guys please don't make it worst please and solve the issue ASAP. 🤦🏼

Blinkit is one of the best E-commerce platforms for people who want their essentials and daily things quickly. A little bit charges higher on a few things but it is okay, because it's giving you a doorstep service and earning to many people. I recommend this app for all people.
Handling charges very high, also have lot of options in the store, few times things are not available but there are various options to choose from

overall service is good but then the delivery agents should know if an order is heavy then they must give extra bag for that or else it may torn and things could fall.....i had faced several times upon it and some of my products got damaged....hope blinkit fixes this soon

i thought blinkit will be useful for me but I was wrong because it is not giving service for our area where there is no shop at all. and we people need this type of service more than the city people where there is already mall and shop but here they are not giving service and no delivery in our area. so I think this app is not useful for those who stays in village and there is less or no shop. see we don't say that deliver us in 20 mins we just say atleast deliver us even it takes one day.

what a app I have never seen this type of app there are hot wheels it is nice but I want to buy corvette c7 which were there but after a few time it gone out of stock i thought it will come after few days but after few days it does not come only in stock and also disappeared from out of stock part I live in jalna thank you

I like the services provided by the app. you can find almost any grocery you want. it delivers on time and the delivery men are kind. however, what I don't like is the wasteful packaging. the paper packaging used adds to pollution and global warming the brunt of which us Indians need to bear. I suggest the delivery men should take the paper packaging back once items are delivered.

delivery is good but customer support experience is very worst. They don't provide much options to solve our problem they only put some FAQs which we already know and we cannot contact customer support.

I ordered two times from this app and both the times I got wrong items delivered and I recommend you to use flipkart minutes or other apps, they often give cheaper prices and more offers than this app and correct items are delivered.
